site.name: ZeroTool
footer.tagline: Free online developer tools. No sign-up, no tracking.
hero.title: Free Online Developer Tools
hero.sub: Fast, private, browser-based. No sign-up required. Works offline.
tool.jsonFormatter.name: JSON Formatter
tool.jsonFormatter.description: Prettify, minify, and validate JSON instantly in your browser.
tool.base64.name: Base64 Encode / Decode
tool.base64.description: Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 back to plain text.
tool.uuidGenerator.name: UUID Generator
tool.uuidGenerator.description: Generate v4 UUIDs instantly — single or batch.
tool.urlEncode.name: URL Encode / Decode
tool.urlEncode.description: Encode or decode URL components and query strings.
tool.textCase.name: Text Case Converter
tool.textCase.description: Convert text to UPPER, lower, Title, camelCase, snake_case, and more.
tool.markdownPreview.name: Markdown Preview
tool.markdownPreview.description: Live Markdown editor with real-time HTML preview. Supports GFM tables, task lists, and code blocks.
tool.colorConverter.name: Color Converter
tool.colorConverter.description: Convert colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL formats with a live color preview.
tool.regexTester.name: Regex Tester
tool.regexTester.description: Test regular expressions in real time with match highlighting and capture group details.
tool.hashGenerator.name: Hash Generator
tool.hashGenerator.description: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512 hashes from any text.
tool.timestampConverter.name: Timestamp Converter
tool.timestampConverter.description: Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates and vice versa. Auto-detects seconds vs milliseconds.
tool.jwtDecoder.name: JWT Decoder
tool.jwtDecoder.description: Decode and inspect JWT header, payload, and signature. Highlights expiry status and timestamp claims.
tool.diffChecker.name: Diff Checker
tool.diffChecker.description: Compare two texts line by line and highlight additions and deletions. Powered by LCS algorithm.
tool.passwordGenerator.name: Password Generator
tool.passwordGenerator.description: Generate cryptographically secure passwords. Customize length and character sets with entropy meter.
tool.qrCodeGenerator.name: QR Code Generator
tool.qrCodeGenerator.description: Generate QR codes from URLs, text, Wi-Fi credentials, and more. Download as PNG.
tool.cronParser.name: Cron Expression Parser
tool.cronParser.description: Parse and explain cron expressions in plain English. Preview next 10 scheduled run times.
tool.loremIpsum.name: Lorem Ipsum Generator
tool.loremIpsum.description: Generate Lorem Ipsum placeholder text instantly. Choose paragraph count and copy to clipboard.
tool.wordCounter.name: Word & Character Counter
tool.wordCounter.description: Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs. Estimate reading and speaking time.
tool.chmodCalculator.name: Chmod Calculator
tool.chmodCalculator.description: Calculate Linux file permissions interactively. Convert between numeric and symbolic notation.
tool.csvJson.name: CSV to JSON Converter
tool.csvJson.description: Convert CSV to JSON and JSON to CSV instantly. Handles quoted fields, auto-detects headers.
tool.htmlEntity.name: HTML Entity Encoder / Decoder
tool.htmlEntity.description: Encode and decode HTML entities. Supports named, decimal, and hex entities.
